name: oracle-suite
description: A working-session toolkit by Not Rest Inc.: ORACLE session intake, a deep researcher, a market researcher, a step-by-step planner, a copy-paste runbook builder, an adversarial critic, a director that chains them into pipelines, a fable-director that seats and rotates the '3 devs and a relay' multi-session dev arrangement (a metered director + flat lanes over per-lane blackboard files with token-watch wakes), a session-end handoff, and fable-mode — a verification-first working-discipline contract auto-anchored into every session by the SessionStart hook — bookended by a shared CLAUDE.md foundation so sessions stay continuous — with automated continuity hooks (SessionStart resume detection + fable-discipline anchor + FABLE-COORD blackboard detection, PreCompact handoff reminder) and a live cross-session handoff line.
